stemHtml: What operating restrictions apply to licence holders aged 60 to under 65 in commercial air transport?

options.a: They may only operate as part of a multi-pilot crew.
options.b: They may only operate in a multi-pilot crew where the other pilot is also a Captain.
options.c: No restrictions provided the other crew member is under 40.
options.d: They may only operate in a multi-pilot crew where the other pilot is under 60.
